name: Finnish Summer Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and halve the potatoes, or cut 6 green onions including tops into 3-inch lengths. Cut green beans into 1-inch lengths.
2. Heat water to boiling in a wide 5-quart pan; add potatoes. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Add salt, pepper, butter, onions, carrots, and green beans; simmer for another 8 minutes.
4. Add peas and cook until vegetables are crisp-tender, about 2 more minutes.
5. In a small bowl, stir together half and half and flour until smooth. Stir into simmering vegetables.
6. Cook, stirring until soup slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.
7. Serving size: 1-2/3 cup. May be served with open faced sandwiches of cream cheese on rye, decorated with sliced vegetables.
